title: What's in Store for Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Pinnacle West Capital's (PNW) second-quarter 2023 results are expected to benefit from expanding customer base. However, a rise in operations and maintenance costs might have had a negative impact.

title: Reasons to Add Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) to Your Portfolio

title: Dividend Powerhouses: 7 Stocks to Outrun Inflation and Grow Your Wealth
text: I'm willing to bet every reader of this article is sick and tired of inflation, which, although falling, remains above 4%. It has hurt stock portfolios, the economy overall, and seems to exact its toll everywhere you go.

title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2023 Second-Quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
